level_1772718364411_erw9i6bmq.name: Th' Gods: Nyan Squash's Revenge
level_1772718364411_erw9i6bmq.startTip:
Woah, this Squash squad be absolutely stacked with talent, huh?
Th' chill Squash, th' pay-to-win Squash, th' charming Squash
Th' hard Squash, th' volatile Squash, th' hot Squash - this be PG material!
And there's even a Squash that shows up and<U><color=#B8860B><SIZE=20>Wipes th' whole floor</SIZE></color>! Sling yer hook!</U>
Plus their very own<U><SIZE=20><color=#F08080>"Princess" Nyan Squash</SIZE></color>! Thundering typhoons! Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!</U>

level_1772722911574_8n760typj.name: Alpha Assassin Hitman
level_1772722911574_8n760typj.startTip:
Alpha Assassin Hitman! Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!
(Yeah th' original blurb writer did not try very hard)

level_1772794811952_9hc854i7q.name: Vasebreaking Puzzle: Anti-air Berserker
level_1772794811952_9hc854i7q.startTip: As absolutelyNobodyKnows, Berserker Snipea can "hit" air units too. While targeting other zombies, th' projectile also casually clips anything flying by. Give it a go and knock those flyers out of th' sky! N.B.: If any plant dies, it'll result in a game over!

level_1772872400910_vnoc3otz4.name: Super Nutsweeper
level_1772872400910_vnoc3otz4.startTip:
<SIZE=26><color=white>
<align=left><U>Spike-nut - 0</U>
<U>Star-nut - 1</U>
<U>Cabbage-nut - 2</U>
<U>Cherry-nut - 3</U>
<U>Flame Wall-nut - 4</U>
<U>Frost Wall-nut - 5</U>
<U>Silver-nut - 6</U>
	<U>Hypno-nut - 7</U>
	<U>Doom-nut - 8</U>
<align=center></color><U>Each Nut type shows th' number of mines around it
Use Coldsnap Beans to mark mine spots - thar be 58 in total, good luck!










</U>

level_1773140970286_7bsqxg8pe.name: Refactoring
level_1773140970286_7bsqxg8pe.startTip:
<size=24><align=left><color=white>Base rules: Shiver me timbers!
<size=18>Odyssey fusions: Disabled
Glove CD: 0s
Wave Interval: 40s
Natural Sun drop: Disabled
Zombie Sun drop: Enabled
Fusion Disassembly: Enabled

<size=144>
<align=center><size=15></color>Difficulty 0-5 all ok. Th' panel on th' left lists every gameplay tweak for this level. Weigh anchor and hoist the mizzen!
Th' first 8 plants in your slots can each only be bought once, while th' remaining 5 can be purchased infinitely (with a short cooldown). Arrr!
Use disassembly and recombine plants into more valuable forms: If ye play it right, ye can even create some base plants.
Note: Plant stats be completely unchanged
<size=300>

level_1773141401946_ajdjyjtmr.name: Vasebreaking Puzzle: Ye flounderin' nincompoop. Hypnosis
level_1773141401946_ajdjyjtmr.startTip:
<size=24><align=left>Base rules:
<size=18>Zombie damage: 2×
Odyssey fusions: Disabled
<size=242>
<align=center><size=18>Pure Puzzler, Recommended difficulties: 0-3 (otherwise may not be solvable)
Th' panel on th' left lists every gameplay tweak for this level, please read them before ye play.
Challenge: Clear th' level without using th' Hypno-shroom in your seed slot.
<size=300>

level_1774021232832_2o5a8h8md.name: Odyssey Gacha: Purgatory of Diamond
level_1774021232832_2o5a8h8md.startTip:
Ye should accept th' whims of fate
Once you've set foot on this path
-------------
Recommended difficulties: 0-4
Mini-bosses be recommended to be disabled
Challenge: Clear th' level with th' 3 settings pertaining to Gacha modes all enabled

level_1774109191871_tfirdlefk.name: Th' Gods: Through Time and Space

level_1774119630318_rld1qhxlg.name: Undead Eternal
level_1774119630318_rld1qhxlg.startTip:
Ye can see all balance changes in this level through th' Editor or using H on plants. Savvy? Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!
Th' Mallet be banned. Cleave him to the brisket!
Zombies in this level have reduced HP but higher damage and increased number.

Click on Good luck to start

level_1774164065908_1y752bodf.name: I, Zombie: Welcome to th' Darkside
level_1774164065908_1y752bodf.startTip:
A very generic I, Zombie level.
As ye can see, ye need to act fast and kill th' Plantern at th' start.
Recommended difficulties: 4-5 (otherwise not solvable)
Submitter: 窝是fvv, Best Solution: 375 Sun left

level_1774174308190_dakkzec42.name: Blank Level (Edit this to reset Level Editor settings)

level_1774316229611_6nctetuy8.name: Grave Tripper
level_1774316229611_6nctetuy8.startTip:
Trip Pole Vaulting Zombies up with Grave Busters. Try to save your Grave Busters. Dead men tell no tales.
Th' Undying Totem Modifier be activated for this level. Challenge: Clear th' level without using th' Undying Totem. Thundering typhoons!

level_1774355110855_hcqameykh.name: Th' Gods: Trial of Synergies
level_1774355110855_hcqameykh.startTip: Submitter: 怪猫_SC(Bilibili) Cherrybomber & Infernal Squashwood Cherrizilla Obsidian Tall-nut McCornics Maelonstrom

level_1774355113900_swfar1lf9.name: Land Grabber
level_1774355113900_swfar1lf9.startTip: Th' Glove in this level has reduced CD, use it well! [High difficulty warning: Try with caution] Cherish every piece of land ye have! Protect your Flower Pots! Tip: Metal zombies too beefy to make a dent in? Maybe ye need some Magnetic power.

level_1774406542551_2cbqzyxbk.name: Vasebreaking Puzzle: Meltdown
level_1774406542551_2cbqzyxbk.startTip:
<size=24><align=left>Base rules: Blow me down!
<size=18>Zombie damage: 2×
Zombie speed: 0.8×
Odyssey fusions: Disabled
<size=18>High Gravity: Enabled
<size=24>Modifiers:
<size=18>Craterless Doom explosions
Zombies have a 0.1s i-frame each hit

<size=120>
<align=center><size=18>Pure Puzzler, Recommended difficulties: Blisterin' barnacles! 0-3 (otherwise may not be solvable)

Th' panel on th' left lists every gameplay tweak for this level, please read them before ye play.
Challenge: Splice the mainbrace! Splice the mainbrace! Clear th' level without using th' Black Cherry in your seed slot.
<size=300>

level_1774599144997_0qpxg22jh.name: Th' Gods: Back to Basics
level_1774599144997_0qpxg22jh.startTip:
<color=red>What be this level? Be we de-evolving?</color>
*<color=yellow>Fascinating. Anyways, watch out for flying zombies and th' Mallet recharges super fast in this level.</color>
<color=green>Support plants: Midas/G.M.Nut/Tall-nuts/Fungularity</color>

level_1774599184523_5jzbx956k.name: Death from Above
level_1774599184523_5jzbx956k.startTip:
Ye will face th' coordinated attacks of flying zombies and bungees.
<color=#FF0000>When it be time for end game, th' winner descends from above!</color>

level_1774600503668_1dle8ve5z.name: Vasebreaking Puzzle: Follow th' Cone
level_1774600503668_1dle8ve5z.startTip: Th' Conehead isn't making any friends with th' Imps after this one...

level_1774600505253_39nuh24z7.name: Vasebreaking Puzzle: Master Strategist
level_1774600505253_39nuh24z7.startTip:
High difficulty warning!

Some zombies can be used against others.
Try to obtain metal objects and fuse them with certain plants.
Their control abilities will help ye deal with troublesome zombies more effectively. Fifteen men on a dead man's chest!
Recommended difficulty: D3

level_1774600506836_lz1dqhcyv.name: Vasebreaking Puzzle: Arrr! Cherrypicking
level_1774600506836_lz1dqhcyv.startTip:
Any difficulty be ok for this level.
              
Try to make as many explosive cherries as possible to wipe out every zombie!

level_1774611032370_90xngigri.name: Stopwatch
level_1774611032370_90xngigri.startTip:
This level be based on D5 and be pretty tough: Choose your difficulty wisely! (Spawns be fixed; only damage reduction can be adjusted).
One full sway up and down of a Pumpkin be roughly equal to 2 seconds.
Glove cooldown be increased to 25s, and ye can only plant down a Flower Pot once!
For th' "true experience," try not using th' H key to check Windy Pumpkin's production CD
If ye want an extra challenge, beat th' level only using Doom-shrooms from your seed slots.

level_1774627145655_lu7rlfvtm.name: Third Time's th' Charm
level_1774627145655_lu7rlfvtm.startTip:
Th' Glove has nay CD in this level, plants recharge faster and ye can disassemble fusions.
Make good use of Puff-shroom stacking and disassembling quirks.
From Three, All Things.

level_1774628038557_3pvkpu1ls.name: Vasebreaker: Snow Burial
level_1774628038557_3pvkpu1ls.startTip:
Squashweeds can slow down Snowfurs effectively.
Coldsnap Beam enables Snow Peas to Deep Chill cold-resistant zombies.
Thar be 2 Elder Snowfurs among th' Vases, watch out for them!

level_1774710991748_nlx90py2s.startTip:

There's little room for error at th' start, be ready to sacrifice units if needed.

level_1774801162568_qibeat3la.name: Acrobatics
level_1774801162568_qibeat3la.startTip:
Designed for Difficulty 5, but feel free to play according to your experience.
Ball juggling be a basic skill in acrobatics.
Insiders judge whether an acrobat be well-trained simply by examining their juggling skills.
This level tests your on that. Blow me down!
It's fine if ye lose your balls, ye have one backup for each of them.
But an expert acrobat does not require off-stage assistance! (Like Mallet, Endoflame, but naturally spawned Fertilizer be ok)
(This level requires heavy micro-management, be prepared to constantly play under slow-mode! But don't worry, th' performance won't be long)
